description: Fol. 2: Deed fragment in which 'the people of Haifa's fortress' are mentioned, 11th century. CUDL description: Recto: the very beginning of a legal document referring to ‘the people of the Fortress of Haifa’, with only a partial date preserved. Verso: two lines, either a title or a short book-list: משלי ואיוב לגאון ז״ל, and underneath in a smaller script וטומאה וטוהרה. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: שבר שטר המזכיר את 'אנשי ביצרון חיפה'. המאה ה-11.
